diff:
diff --git a/src/auth.py b/src/auth.py
index 1234567..abcdefg 100644
--- a/src/auth.py
+++ b/src/auth.py
@@ -10,6 +10,12 @@ def login(username, password):
     user = db.get_user(username)
     if not user:
         return None
+
+    # Rate limit: max 5 attempts per minute
+    attempts = cache.get(f'login:{username}', 0)
+    if attempts >= 5:
+        raise RateLimitError('Too many login attempts')
+    cache.incr(f'login:{username}', ttl=60)
     return verify_password(password, user.password_hash)
pr_description: Prevents brute-force attacks by limiting login attempts to 5 per minute per username.
